{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302310961C84E195CB2D42DA807"}"},"total":689},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572947378016879384","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"熊猫新作，风格依旧，学霸文着重突出一个爽感，相比于此，次要人物的刻画也相比上一本书更加完善立体鲜明，确实经过了一些时间的沉淀有了长进，目前89章，期待熊猫的下一步"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763217535,"group_id":"7556923409150512190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个很懒的作者，很忙不会常更，只想要小摆亿小天，打赏速速多多","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxbKNBFb2HRZMoy+wGuK2zaUVsJY+7hxxijP8n8yxiKP","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bfa5d94189e54919aa9b048f175d8b74~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787964&x-signature=D4p%2FH0BD1Q5WEBPhdWgOKQrO0ZI%3D","user_id":"2480124966475631","user_name":"竹叶清江月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2480124966475631","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556923409150512190","book_info":{"abstract":"【学霸＋黑科技＋科技兴国＋爽文】
高中生唐江得到“学霸声望系统”，扬名立万赚取声望，即可兑换黑科技道具！
过目不忘、智商加点！癌症药、七代机、太空武器图纸！从学霸成长为科技巨头！
校花：“不要问我怎么追不到他，校花有很多，唐江就一个！”
清北教授：“我两年搞不定的课题被他两天速通，在他面前我像新兵蛋子！”
诺奖得主：“其实我早就是唐江的弟子了！他的论文我全文背诵！”
武器专家：“无法看懂唐江设计的武器，我只知道美的惊人，像外星产物！”
股神：“我的时代落幕了，唐江用数学赚钱比印钞机还快！”
制药巨头：“绝症药卖白菜价，唐江的野蛮手段今天干掉我们，明天会干掉所有药企！”
唐江难绷，天堂有路你不走，学海无涯苦作舟！科技学术这一块，想追上我再练三百年！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7bc551918f757079708794734a958ea9","author":"吃肉的熊猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7556923409150512190","book_name":"我高中生，当高考命题人很合理吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0a088","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7192人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556923545717064254","read_count":"7192","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"301510"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"134","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸,校花,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bd8381a715a0dcb81ab7f9b18c088ddf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388269&x-signature=ntdFR65j29k8JECuli%2FaWWttpA0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4155809932782092","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302310961C84E195CB2D42DA807"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarde
